steps.name: Given the user clicks on login button on the landing page
When the user click the sign up link
And the user enters first name Josey
And the user enters last name Matee
And the user enters register email jmat1gmail.com
And the user enters register password @12345678
And the user enters confirm password @12345678
And the user selects group group 5 assignment (2026)
And the user click the sign up button
Then the user is successfully registered
